log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician HP: 40/59
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician HP: 26/59
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician HP: 7/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician --- HP: 7/59 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (7/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Custom Lineage — Bardic Musician HP: -8/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
